---
title: "Our kinda people <33"
description: "The people building iSRL — researchers, analysts, and contributors working on Indian food data infrastructure."
listing:
  id: team-listing
  contents: 
    - "*.qmd"
    - "!_team-item.ejs.md"

  type: custom
  template: _team-item.ejs.md
  fields:
    - title
    - subtitle
    - description
    - image
    - path
    - team-role
    - team-track
  sort: "order asc"
---

::: {#team-listing}
:::
